title: quercus macrolepis subsp. ithaburensis
intro: Quercus macrolepis subsp. ithaburensis, also known as the Evergreen Oak or Turkish Oak, is a subspecies of evergreen tree belonging to the Quercus genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Quercus macrolepis subsp. ithaburensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs.
